a with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals 2 m i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 4 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 3 n k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space d a n space b with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals 6 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 4 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus 2 m k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top
